title: [MTR/NTE] nanobus
body:
# Welcome to **nanobus**

**Pack contain vehicles such as:**
- PAZ
- LiAZ
- KaVZ
- BAZ
- GAZ
- and more soon...

**Works stable on MTR3! MTR4 have no support!**

Requires [Harry's Lib](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/harryslib)



Developers:
protondead && nbt1248 (left)
